title: Linage
description: Data model for data linage in a statistical production process.

data_source.description: Reference or filepath to one or more input datasets used as data source.
data_source.$comment: Dataset filepath (eg. GCS-path to a parquet file).

data_target.description: Reference or filepath to one or more target datasets (where data is stored after the process has been run).
data_target.$comment: Dataset filepath (eg. GCS-path to a parquet file).

step.description: A string describing at which step in the process the log is for.

file_hash.description: List of SHA-256 hashes, matching the files in the data_sources field.
